commands: echo '--- Current Magento shopping base URL ---'

docker exec shopping mysql -u magentouser -pMyPassword magentodb -N -e "SELECT path,value FROM core_config_data WHERE path LIKE 'web/unsecure/base_url' OR path LIKE 'web/secure/base_url';" 2>&1 || true
echo '--- Setting shopping base_url to private IP ---'
docker exec shopping mysql -u magentouser -pMyPassword magentodb -e "UPDATE core_config_data SET value='http://$PRIVATE_IP:7770/' WHERE path = 'web/secure/base_url';" 2>&1 || true
docker exec shopping mysql -u magentouser -pMyPassword magentodb -e "UPDATE core_config_data SET value='http://$PRIVATE_IP:7770/' WHERE path = 'web/unsecure/base_url';" 2>&1 || true
echo '--- Setting shopping_admin base_url to private IP ---'
docker exec shopping_admin mysql -u magentouser -pMyPassword magentodb -e "UPDATE core_config_data SET value='http://$PRIVATE_IP:7780/' WHERE path = 'web/secure/base_url';" 2>&1 || true
docker exec shopping_admin mysql -u magentouser -pMyPassword magentodb -e "UPDATE core_config_data SET value='http://$PRIVATE_IP:7780/' WHERE path = 'web/unsecure/base_url';" 2>&1 || true
docker exec shopping mysql -u magentouser -pMyPassword magentodb -N -e "SELECT path,value FROM core_config_data WHERE path LIKE 'web/%/base_url';" 2>&1
